home.title: Your Recipe Collection
home.emptyState: No recipes yet. Extract your first recipe to get started!

extract.title: Extract a Recipe
extract.subtitle: Paste a recipe URL and we'll format it for you.

extractForm.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL (e.g., https://example.com/recipe).

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

recipeNotFound.title: Recipe Not Found
recipeNotFound.description: This recipe doesn't exist or has been removed.

recipeCreationSupervisor.messageBlocked: Your message was blocked for security reasons. Please enter a recipe description.
recipeCreationSupervisor.maxRoundsReached: Maximum clarification rounds reached. Please start over with a fuller recipe description that includes a title, ingredients, and steps.
recipeCreationSupervisor.notARecipe: I couldn't understand your message as a recipe. Please try again with a valid recipe description.
recipeCreationSupervisor.needMoreInfo: I need a bit more information to complete the recipe. Can you add the missing preparation steps or ingredients?

recipeCreation.title: Create a Recipe with AI
recipeCreation.subtitle: Describe your recipe in plain text and we'll structure it for you.
recipeCreation.placeholder: Start by describing your recipe. For example: "Classic spaghetti carbonara: pasta, eggs, guanciale, pecorino, black pepper..."
recipeCreation.inputPlaceholder: Describe your recipe or answer the questions above…
